response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy depth, or direct experience with large-scale AI infrastructure — key requirements for this director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems design
Active knowledge sharing and workshop leadership demonstrating communication and influence skills
concerns: No demonstrable AI/ML product or platform built with deep technical ownership
Limited evidence of cloud AI strategy experience beyond basic tooling contributions
No advanced degree in AI or related field, and resume lacks metrics or impact on AI-driven business outcomes
